Database refresh error (computed_at column type mismatch) prevented fresh data but alert system remained functional. pftui commands mostly worked well for investigation workflow. Missing scan-specific movers command would be useful.
pftui data excellent for brief foundation. Alert-watchdog cron failing (28 errors) needs attention. News command returned empty for 12h window.

F46 stored market structure levels engine: technical_levels table + compute from swing pivots + SMA/BB/52W/round-number levels + analytics levels CLI + refresh integration. PR #33 merged. 1330 tests pass. Remaining: surface in brief/web/alerts.
Successfully identified FOMC meeting + Middle East energy concerns as catalyst for cross-asset selloff. Clear scenario validation for Iran-US War + Inflation Spike. Good routing to agent pipeline.
data refresh failed with computed_at timestamp error but other commands worked well. pftui provided comprehensive portfolio/conviction/scenario data avoiding multiple web searches

BIG-LOSERS scan alert investigation successful. Portfolio brief comprehensive (-1.67% daily, DXY pressure). Alert ack workflow clean. Scenario/regime data aligned with findings. Good agent pipeline messaging. Enhancement: journal section validation could be clearer.
pftui data commands provided complete context for FOMC day investigation. Suggestion: add alert-specific section to journal notes command. Portfolio brief was comprehensive for assessing impact.
Processed 3 stale Iran war alerts (wheat/DXY/silver). System working but alerts sat unprocessed for days. Alert acknowledgment workflow needs monitoring.

F51 asset intelligence blob: added analytics asset <SYMBOL> --json command aggregating spot price, technicals, levels, correlations, regime, scenarios, trends, alerts, portfolio, watchlist, convictions, and freshness into one canonical payload. PR #35 merged. 1338 tests pass. Clean implementation reusing existing data layer functions. No friction points — imports, backend patterns, and data access modules were well-organized.
Detected broad selloff across all holdings, correlation breaks, risk-off regime. No specific catalyst identified through news search.
pftui portfolio brief and analytics commands provided excellent context for alert investigation. No alerts required investigation - routine worked as designed.
data refresh command failed with computed_at timestamp type error, but portfolio/analytics/messaging commands worked properly
Alert investigation: No new unacknowledged alerts. Portfolio down 2.14% in risk-off environment. VIX 25, regime confirmed.
Fed-driven precious metals decline investigated. No alerts fired. Portfolio down -2.14% on positioning ahead of Fed meeting. Risk-off confirmed. No action needed.

pftui data commands provided solid baseline (fedwatch 95.9% hold, COT positioning, scenarios). data sovereign command failed on COMEX silver but others worked well. Suggestion: add oil inventory/SPR data command for energy analysis. Overall tool quality high for structured data vs web searches.

Fixed computed_at TIMESTAMPTZ cast in technical_snapshots and technical_levels PostgreSQL queries. Root cause: F45/F46 shipped without ::TIMESTAMPTZ casts on INSERT and ::TEXT casts on SELECT — pattern already established in price_cache.rs but not followed in new modules. Multiple agents reported this for 24+ hours. Two-file fix, surgical. 1338 tests pass, clippy clean, verified against production PG. PR #37 merged.

Alert investigation completed successfully. No unacked alerts found. System stable in risk-off regime. Minor concern: portfolio brief command failing with DB column type mismatch in technical_snapshots table.

portfolio eod JSON output works well for structured data but price snapshot command returned exit code 2 - need a dedicated price-only snapshot subcommand under data or portfolio. Also pftui data sovereign failed entirely. analytics summary and divergence returned empty objects. FedWatch and sentiment data were excellent and directly usable. Scenario and prediction scoring workflow is smooth. The agent message system with ack-all is clean. Main gap: no consolidated closing-price endpoint that gives all watched symbols in one call.

Detected critical metals paradox: oil absorbing safe-haven bid during war escalation. Gold/silver breaking traditional patterns despite Iran attacking Gulf energy. System correctly identified scenario probability shifts and regime change.

TIMESTAMPTZ binary deployment fix: code fix was already merged (PR #37) but deployed binary at /root/.cargo/bin/pftui was stale (Mar 18 03:14 vs fix merged Mar 18 18:13). Copied target/release/pftui to resolve. Both pftui data refresh and pftui analytics alerts check --json now complete without panics. All 1338 tests pass and clippy clean.

F49 steps 1-4: precomputed technical signal engine. Added technical_signals table (SQLite+PG) + signal generation during refresh (RSI overbought/oversold, MACD cross, SMA200 reclaim/break, BB squeeze, volume expansion, 52W extremes). Extended analytics signals with --source technical/timeframe/all flag. 49 signals generated from 80 symbols on first production refresh. 1352 tests pass, clippy clean. PR #38 merged.
No unacked alerts found. System healthy in risk-off regime (VIX 25, Iran-US War 95%, oil 6). Alert system functioning properly.

F49 step 5 complete: wired precomputed technical signals into brief JSON (top-level technical_signals array + per-mover signals) and movers --json (per-mover signals). 49 signals surfaced in production. Also resolved CHANGELOG.md conflict markers from prior merge. PRs #52 and #53 merged. 1386 tests pass, clippy clean, release binary deployed.
Big-gainers scan alert properly captured risk-off rotation. Data quality good, routing effective.

SI=F big-losers alert correctly triggered on -5.71% Iran war selloff. Clean investigation workflow, clear catalyst identification (Qatar LNG damage + DXY strength), good scenario mapping. System functioning as designed.

Big-gainers scan correctly identified kitchen appliance surge from Iran-Qatar LNG disruption. Clear catalyst, proper investigation flow, good documentation. Minor: scan naming could be more specific to avoid confusion with broad market gainers vs niche sector moves.

pftui data sources comprehensive for pre-market analysis. Portfolio brief json format excellent. Technical signals rich. Could benefit from correlation break alerts built into system rather than manual detection. Analytics scan filters working well for risk monitoring.
BIG-GAINERS scan alert processed. Iran war escalation caused broad risk-off. System correctly identified regime shift.

F47.1 system daemon: added pftui system daemon start/status with PID lock, heartbeat JSON, SIGTERM/SIGINT graceful shutdown, structured logging, alert evaluation per cycle. 434 lines across 4 files. 1391 tests pass (5 new), clippy clean. PR #54 merged, release binary deployed. Codebase well-structured — refresh module already had lock file pattern and quiet mode to build on.
pftui movers analytics captured -6.4% silver selloff accurately. Scenario probabilities (Iran War 95%, Inflation Spike 92%) align with market reality. Risk-off regime detection working well.
No alerts triggered this hour. Alert system functioning normally - scan activity acknowledged properly. Clean investigation workflow.

Evidence system and prediction scoring very valuable for tracking accuracy.

F48 step 2: OHLCV-aware ATR indicator + range expansion + breakout signals. 15 new tests. 1411 total pass. PR #57 merged. Remaining F48: backfill only.

analytics movers returned 0 results despite gold -10pct and silver -14pct moves suggesting threshold or calculation issue. data news --json failed with exit code 1 but text mode worked. prediction add requires positional timeframe syntax not --timeframe flag which is confusing. conviction set works well with positional args. scenario update works. sentiment and fedwatch data solid and saved significant web_search calls. Overall decent but the movers scanner missing the biggest metals crash in 40 years is a notable gap.
